description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and sign. In the build stage add a job named build that runs on the "lineage-builder" tag, triggers only on pipeline triggers or web, sets variables BUILD_ENFORCE_SELINUX='1', BUILD_NO=$CI_PIPELINE_ID, BUILD_NUMBER='', CPU_SSE42='false', PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='true', USE_CCACHE='1', and executes the following script commands in order: export BUILD_NUMBER=$( (date +%s%N ; echo $CI_PIPELINE_ID; hostname) | openssl sha1 | sed -e 's/.*=//g; s/ //g' | cut -c1-10 ); cd /lineage/${VERSION}; rm -rf .repo/local_manifests/*; if [ -f /lineage/setup.sh ]; then source /lineage/setup.sh; fi; repo init -u https://github.com/lineageos/android.git -b ${VERSION}; echo "Resetting build tree"; repo forall -vc "git reset --hard" > /dev/null 2> /dev/null; echo "Syncing"; repo sync -j32 -d --force-sync > /dev/null 2> /dev/null; . build/envsetup.sh; mka clobber; set +e; breakfast lineage_${DEVICE}-${TYPE}; set -e; if [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" == "experimental" ]; then repopick $EXP_PICK_CHANGES; fi; mka otatools-package target-files-package dist; ssh jenkins@blob.lineageos.org mkdir -p /home/jenkins/incoming/${DEVICE}/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/; scp out/dist/*target_files*.zip jenkins@blob.lineageos.org:/home/jenkins/incoming/${DEVICE}/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/; scp out/target/product/${DEVICE}/otatools.zip jenkins@blob.lineageos.org:/home/jenkins/incoming/${DEVICE}/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/. In the sign stage add a job named sign that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs on the "signing-proxy" tag, triggers only on triggers or web, sets PYTHONUNBUFFERED='1', and runs: source /home/gitlab-runner/env.sh; pip install -r requirements.txt; python sign.py.
